name: Pea Pod/Carrot Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pea pods and carrots in a saucepan.
2. Cover with water; add salt.
3. Cook until tender.
4. Drain the mixture.
5. Melt margarine in the saucepan.
6. Add Worcestershire sauce; stir to blend.
7. Add pea pods and carrots back into the saucepan.
8. Toss to coat evenly.
Yield: 4 servings Exchange/serving: 1/2 bread, 1/2 fat Calories: 50
